reviews.review_description:
Very poorly executed mobile game in vr perspective. Pay to win, cash grabbing, visually off putting and straight up ugly. Don't waste your time, storage space, or Baal forbid actual money on this pile of digital diarrhea. Devs reply to every poor review with a bunch of garbage guarantees about daily bonuses and rewarding skilled players, even though this might have the worst hit detection that I have seen on any point to shoot or motion control game in general so they obviously are not interested in feedback to improve their product. I wish them nothing but failure.
666 thumbs down
Nice game, easy to play. The server frquently goes down though

My son loves the game but due to his mental condition struggles with advancing is there a dev in game menu or side load work around to tweak the in game variables so I don't have to recreate this game or maybe you have the dev engine file that I could run I would like to just swap a couple of variables inside the system file path and be done with it I know this is a odd request I use to work for several big game companies, Unreal, Bungie, Blizzard and so I have been able to adjust in certain run environments for him, it's such a small thing that makes him happy so I do what I can since his mother passed away contact info if able.
Liked the game then all of a sudden game won’t launch and keep getting error code 1007
Very fun

reviews.review_title: Was a great game when I could play it.
reviews.review_description: I loved this game and would have given it 5 stars, but all of a sudden about two or so weeks ago it stopped loading. The "Mix Rift" logo comes up and the controllers turn into guns and that's it. Nothing else starts up. I've tried everything including uninstall/reinstall. It just will not load any more. Maybe some day the issue will get corrected.
I'm addicted! Fun game! But devs....can we get some new guns? Chaingun?

Definitely one of my favorite games. 🤘🏻

EDIT: you don’t NEED to spend money on this game. There’s daily challenges to do, you get a sign in bonus every day, and some of your kills have a chance to drop coins. I have over 12,000 and I didnt buy any of them. 
I’m not sure where “pay walls” and “greed” are coming from because I see neither of those things happening with this game.

Nice game but it would be nice if you would put some more into it.
Like
 ducking from stuff...
Catching stuff and throw it back...
Using a shields
Enemies breaking through the roof...
Things like these..
Or maybe all these for some end boss enemies
This is my go to game when I just wanna' sit and kill stuff. When I play my quest I get tired sometimes of running  around in mixed reality through the house . this game lets me kick back and chill.

Well, I guess it's to be expected but another good game ruined by greed. Cool , simple, play anytime game but instead of awarding skill and player progression, you get microtransactions and slot machine("rng") mechanics. 1 hit you're dead forcing a continue, instead of offering a shield system. "Buffs" are "random" ... I don't know I've never got 5 +1 pierce or +1 bullet in a row, but surely have got more points or more coins multiple times in a row, that does nothing against the round difficulty increase. Putting "much more" perks behind paywall that don't offer the "more" aspect. At least make it fire on press  instead of fire on release.
Really enjoyed this game
I imagine a good update would be to improve the weapons according to each stage reached.
Noice

reviews.review_title: I completely agree with the previous fee
reviews.review_description: I completely agree with the previous feedback. The game has a lot of potential, but it's really annoying to constantly have to spend money to enjoy it.
Pretty cool, and its free! It's fun to play.
Fun game!! Wish you wouldn't die after only 1 hit but I enjoy it
Fun and free. Wish there was a questing system
Needs a local coop mode.

Who doesn't like shooting zombies in your living room
?
BUY THIS GAME. Its so frick'n addictive. I love it I love it. Although, the developers could work on the graphics... Wink wink, hint hint 🙃

Buying a game means wanting to play and explore for long. This game is great but the need to buy coins because you can’t progress pass a level is terrible. It kills the vibe. Just let the players restart like other games. Also study other games for better money generating model. Your current model takes customers away before they event get hooked in. Anyways this is one of the best mixed reality home invasion game. Do better!

Great principle to this game.  Nice play and graphics.

Here's the gripe.

Goto shop then thinking I can upgrade guns, but it is for selling  coins to use in game.
So basically, you can't really get far unless you use coins in game. 

It's exactly like a free mobile phone game.  Selling you crap for real money to progress. For what purpose? Spend all that money all the time and get nothing in the end. 
Basically a scam for cash grab!! 

Another thing, it keeps sending me messages to my phone to remind me to play for daily rewards!!.
I don't want messages off any games going to my phone. Should be in quest notifications only.

The top player in charts has a huge score that just seems impossible to get to unless you spend coins!! Which isn't very fair on someone who just wants to go play a game and progress fairly. 

So unless you spend a lot of money to get coins to use you can't really top the charts.
You do earn coins in game, but they such a small amount it would take forever to gain enough to progress to somewhere close to top of charts.

I'm a sharp shooter and couldn't get above wave 16!!

Absolutely disgraceful that they peddling contant flow of real money off people. 

Make a game, set a price, and make it fair so that everyone has the same advantage!!

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear that you haven't been enjoying our game! ☹️

We've done our best to design Hell Horde in a way that favors skill above anything else. This means that, while players have the option to give themselves an easier time with the use of coins, the game remains fully playable at a high level, even without any investment.

On top of that, we also have the missions, daily rewards and coin frenzy perk, which can supplement your runs with a few coins.

We'd be delighted if you gave our game a second try, so, if there's anything else we can improve, your feedback is very welcome!

reviews.review_description: can't wait for the sequel this game is very cool
I love playing this game it’s one of my favorites

My score keeps freezing.  I make it to the top 10, and stop playing.  Come back and play again and my score never changes. Depressing to see my ranking drop from 5 to 70 and never goes up til the next week,  and then it does it again.
i have not found many games at all on the vr device that weren't associated with the xbox that i enjoy...this blows all the others away!!! thank you so much
It’s not good for everybody

Been playing since October 2024, this has been my favorite game and play it daily without fail. Regularly in the top 5 on the weekly leader board, last week my score was 53mil, and not ashamed to say I'm a paying player.

Unfortunately, this game has been going downhill and the last change a few days ago has greatly affected the game.
1. The game constantly glitches when around 20 million and above with demons not taking damage and then you die
2. The RNG for gun upgrades has been reduced drastically over the last couple of months. Good luck getting decent upgrades anymore. You'll get a lot of more points or faster bullets with severely reduced upgrades for pierce, + 1 bullet, damage and critical. 
3. Several days ago the movement of the Succubi was changed to where they are moving side to side quite quickly which has increased the difficulty much.  When you're in the millions is one thing but for new players...

Improve the above and I'll edit my review. 

~Hog
Looks great,  very fast and exciting.  I would like to see more use of the environment.

You no come on this game had mixed reviews, but I don't think it earned them. 

granted i am brand new to vr, so I am still pretty easily impressed, but i thought it was awesome
The game is not good the quality and everything
Some creatures walk up high, and over others. Would be nice to see different ways creatures die. Explode or something. Otherwise a wonderful game. Plus newer weapons and upgrades.
Currently my go to shooter to unwind. It's a fun shooter with decent graphics just what you need when you wanna blow off some steam!
Game is very addicting

The only complaint I have is with the missions of the day. You have no way of knowing which monster is being targeted. You should have pictures with the target name. What is Kittyros ?😁 Besides this I have no complaints. Basically found my new game I spend most of my time on now.
Fun free game
Probably the best demon shooting game I’ve ever played… This thing is awesome 💯👍👍
add Gun pitch and Gun Yaw options so that it can be used externally (ace gun or k3d gun) and I will give it 5 stars

Fun 

i wish it had more modes
Easy to pick up hard to put down

This 
game
suck

This used to be a 5 star gor me really fun. A game I really really liked. Then came the update. Unlike most people that reviewed it it I didn't think it was a rip off because I could just earn coins and I got a reasonably high score and had lots of fun until some update came along and now I can't use boundaries like room scale boundaries which totally sucks because now when I back up the whole game backs up with me where as  before with room scale boundary I could back up 10 ft
Horde is a great way to pass the time whole you wait for your buddy to get on.
I don't know how people rate this over 4 stars. The gameplay is very very basic. The graphics and animations are bad and clunky.

I Really love your game this is one of the best shooter games i've ever played in my life so far. this is so fun and it's cool how it looks like it's gonna come into the real world since it's mixed reality also i'm a huge fan of your Game

I love playing this game, however it gets very frustrating because it does not save. So if you get to wave 20 and get killed you have to start from the very beginning which can be really annoying.  I will continue to play this  game because it is fun to play . After play9ng more of this, and the developer explaining some more, I still think it is unfair that your guns , the bullets you build up and other achievements are lost when you get killed. If you have to start from the beginning you sohlud at least be able to start with what you earned . Hence why I have taken 1 star off .

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words and honest feedback!

We've designed Hell Horde to feel kinda like one of those old arcade machines. That's why, each time you lose, you have to start from the very beginning again.

However, we are working on some pretty cool updates to keep things fresh, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: This is a great concept for mixed reality, I think the feeling of having a portal to Heck open up in your house is surreal & cool. The gameplay is simple to grasp yet difficult to master. There's a surprising amount of strategy. It's hard to ignore how much of the game seemingly uses AI-generated assets, mainly the landscape backdrops that take up a huge amount of your FOV. Some of the other textures & models have that AI quality of unspecific detail too. It's a free game (with microtransactions) so I can't complain too much, but in future updates & games I would prefer to see handcrafted assets.

developer_response.body: Thank you for you kind words and feedback! We're glad that you're enjoying Hell Horde and we are doing our best to make it better! ❤️‍🔥

reviews.review_description: Fun game. Great mix of reality and game. Well blended. Im suprised i got it for free!!
Great game
Smooth crisp Graphics  , nice little shooter . Blast them back to Hell.

I really truly enjoy playing this game BUT like another player stated if you have to restart at least allow us to keep a few of the weapons upgrades if they used coins and also allow the player to save them.  I know this was meant to resemble the old style arcade games that we all grew up with.  Also can we add an extra pillar that allows us to view the monsters so we know what we are up against as we advance

developer_response.body: Thanks for your kind words! We are working on some crazy new things for Hell Horde and we believe a lot of what you've mentioned will get much better, so stay tuned for updates!

reviews.review_description: Great game. The more u play, the more u enjoy. Hard but fair, great job.
Been having issues with the guns just not firing lately. Don't have problems with any other game so I don't know what the issue is. Other then that i really enjoy the game.
The only problem is how the graphics and physics of the monsters arent the best
The field of action is always from the same direction and therefore repetitive. Change directions no? Two simultaneous directions no? Why?
Its a good game for a little free time
This is a great game, its also free!

This has been one of the games I’ve enjoyed playing since I bought my VR, I love the art direction, I love the concept, & this is a must have for fans of shooting galleries, light-gun games, or arcade holster shooters. Weekly leaderboards keep it fresh & competitive. Happy hunting!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words and for your support! We're glad that you're enjoying Hell Horde! ❤️‍🔥

reviews.review_description: This VR game is fantastic. Graphics are amazing.. Game play is exciting. Sound effects and music are wonderful. I love everything about it. I enjoy playing it every day. This is my favorite game in my Meta Quest library.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words and for your support! We're happy that you're enjoying Hell Horde! ❤️‍🔥

reviews.review_description: I get the starting over when you die thing with this game to mimic old school arcade games. But the whole random upgrades idea makes it very hard to come up with any strategy/builds for the guns . And worst of all in the one in a million chance that the games does give you the piercing + 1 perk , all of a sudden there are now flying demons  shooting back at you . At least give the option to not take an upgrade instead of using 100 coins . My whole thing is if the weapons are not strong enough to pass a level why charge coins to continue. Seems like the I end goal here is to bank on the player using real money to buy more coins when you can make smart changes  to your weapons in order to pass the level. Brilliant .

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest feedback! We are currently working on some really cool updates that will address many of the things you mentioned! Stay tuned to our social channels as we prepare to show you what we've been cooking! 💖

reviews.review_description: This is a great AR experience with a portal to hell in my living room. Fun shooter, nice world integration. Was jumping when something made it to me.
Good game good graphics, maybe could have more gun options

reviews.review_title: Losing weapons after being killed sux
reviews.review_description: I love this game.. but why do we have to lose our guns and start from the beginning 😕 🤔 😔 thats what keeps it from being 5 🌟

developer_response.body: Thank you for you kind words and feedback! We built Hell Horde as an arcade experience and that is why the progress resets every time you lose a run. However, as we continue building new things for the game, we hope to improve the experience!

I'm pretty new to this game but it's pretty addicting. I can't believe it was a free game. I'm really looking forward to see what they're going to do next with it. Good job guy's.

developer_response.body: Thank you for you kind words and support! We're glad that you're enjoying Hell Horde! ❤️‍🔥

Simple and relaxing.

reviews.review_title: Easy to learn, difficult to master
reviews.review_description:
I wasn't sure that would like a game like this, but it has since become my daily game for a session of killing monsters from hell. The execution is great and MR works well. 

The new daily rewards bring you back repeatedly. 

I do share the frustration of no saves and look forward to what the devs will add in future versions.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad that you're enjoying Hell Horde! 🤘We're also working on some crazy new things, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Feels like those frustrating games from the 90s at the arcade that wanted you to keep putting coins in the machines. Boo. It's not the 1990s anymore!! VERY disappointed. Glad it's free. Uninstalling.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that your experience hasn't been great! 😞 We did make Hell Horde with the intention of bringing people back to the arcade times. Our intention is to make the game easy to understand, but hard to master. If you think that any particular change could improve the overall experience, we'd love to get your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
This game is fun. The gameplay is very well designed, the graphics are surprisingly                                                                    good and the audio design actually really cool. So why does it get one stars? Because the monetization is modelled after the worst of the worst when it comes to mobile games. 

The difficulty ramps up in a way where you simply can't progress without paying, and the prices for the coins you need to buy stuff in-game is ridiculous. If this was a one-time purchase and had a difficulty that didn't scale up solely so you have to spend real money on the game, it would have been really solid title. As it is now though? I can't recommend this. I would say have some fun with the coins you've given at the start, then move on. Do not spend money on this. Do not support this predatory business model.

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear that you haven't been enjoying our game! ☹️

We've done our best to design Hell Horde in a way that favors skill above anything else. This means that, while players have the option to give themselves an easier time with the use of coins, the game remains fully playable at a high level, even without any investment.

On top of that, we also have the daily rewards, which can supplement your runs with a few coins.

We'd be delighted if you gave our game a second try, so, if there's anything else we can improve, your feedback is very welcome!

reviews.review_description: good game for being free , has potential , needs a settings menu to tweak the aiming and stuff.

I absolutely cannot stop playing this game. It is an easy/repetitive game. Graphics and sound effects are very well done. I have a couple of questions/suggestions for developers: 1- The challenges for killing X number of “insert name of zombies”, please add a help page or insert the image of that zombie/enemy. Most of those names mean absolutely nothing to us. 2- It would be great to be able to see each weapon’s stats (as we accumulate extra powers). 3- In my best try, I am getting a score of 1M, but I see on the score board people who regularly score above 100M. How is that even possible? Please provide a clue.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! To address your concerns, we are working on a bunch of updates that will improve clarity and info visibility in the game. As for how to reach a higher score, the best advice we can give is to play around with different perks combinations. Some of those are stronger than you might think! 😉

reviews.review_description: The game is great fun but why is sound so low quality? Why guns look so childish? Quest 3 graphic update necessary. So much can be done here. Improve please.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest feedback! We are working on some crazy new updates, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
Had an issue first time I tried this game, but it is working now. It is a fun simple shooter. I like how quickly I can get into a game.

Hey meta site coders. Maybe make the review window not disappear while someone is typing a review. I should have to click the 'X' to close the review window. Please fix you site. No one wants to type a review twice.

developer_response.body:
Hey there! Sorry to hear that you are having issues with recentering! As a bit of a clarification, the recentering function only works in the main menu (the one with the play button). Next time you'd like to move the portal, make sure you go to the menu first and check if that works a little better.

If the issues persist, we'd love to help you fix this if you wrote to us on Discord. We make sure to check it daily and answer all of our players' questions: https://discord.gg/dbYdcY3Eg3

Agree with all the other great reviews…..
More enemy and weapon types would be a great addition….

I gave four stars and will reserve the final one for the finished product…..

reviews.review_description:
My friend suggested this to me.  Now I can't stop playing it! It gets really freaky when they really close & are running right at you! Not sure why games hsrdly ever give instructions..so.. my best advice: always aim for their head gives more points, best options Pierce +1 enemies, burst +1,  increase amt of ammo, faster reload, increase damage. "Chance" to do anything is a waste ;)
  
CREATORS 🙏 READ & ANSWER IF YOU HAVE TIME!

It would be a little more interesting if they didn't fall the exact same way every time. It kinda looks like a choreographed dance after a while. 
I will apologize in advance, if my questions & suggestions sound stupid. I'm from an older generation (in my 50s), & was never into video games until VR took over my life lol so im sorry if my old brain requires a bit more clarification lol. 

☆Questions: 
1-Somewhere around the 20th wave or so, it sounds like the audio (sound of the bullets) are cutting out. Is this on purpose?
2-When you select an option, does it stay with you for the remainder of the game? Or does it run out at some point? For instance, faster reload & bullets never really seems any faster. & pierce +1 sometimes remains, sometimes goes away.
3- Does faster reload even work?? Seriously It never seems any faster. Or is it just for the one wave & only for the gun you selected the option with. 

☆☆Suggestions (♡with all due respect♡) for improvement** 

1- Can you please add the next Wave # to the top of the screen while in between waves? Sometimes I'll be so hyped up that I forget which wave I'm heading into, & it would help me choose the best option. 
2- Missions: When it says to defeat a certain monster, we have no idea who that monster is! Maybe put a photo of said monster instead? Does it even really matter? Because you have to defeat ALL of them no matter what... its not like you really have a choice lol  .. maybe change it to  "make it passed Wave 12".
3- After completing a wave, you are given 2 options.. at the bottom of the box it says it pertains to the firing weapon. Please change it to if it pertains to both weapons at the same time, or just the weapon you are clicking on it with.

developer_response.body:
Hey Jade! Thank you for your insightful review!

To start off, here are the answers to your questions:

1. The audio cutting out is an issue we are aware of and which we plan on fixing in a future update.
2. All the perks that you acquire during a run stay active until you die. When you start a new run, the perks are reset.
3. Faster reload, like all other perks, stays active until the end of the run. However, it is only active on the weapon that you select it with.

Now, to address your suggestions as well, the first two are really good feedback and other players have been requesting similar features. We're actively looking into implementing some of these in future builds.

As for your third suggestion, while very interesting, it poses a huge development challenge. 

The way the game currently works is by giving some of the perks to the gun that you select them with. Giving those perks to both of your guns would require a full overhaul of the game, in order to ensure that the difficulty still scales up similarly. This is something that we are actively discussing internally, but, even if we decide to go for it, this could only be implemented a lot later down the line.

I hope I've managed to cover everything. If there are more things you'd like to discuss, we'd love to hear from you on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/dbYdcY3Eg3

reviews.review_description:
As some other reviews already stated, after spending around 500 coins on some upgrades and then losing on wave 10 (Was by accident but I don’t think I would have gone much further anyways) I got 40 coins even after buying the enemies drop more coins upgrade twice 💀
And then there’s a 7000 coins offer for 10€ 💀
